follow_ups.subject: Re: Free Mortgage Affordability Widget for Real Estate Witch
follow_ups.body:
Hi there,

Just following up on my email from last week about our free mortgage affordability widget.

It lets your readers see what home they can afford in seconds — free, no signup, simple embed.

Preview: https://www.qfinhub.com/widgets/mortgage-affordability-embed

Would this be useful for your readers? Happy to help with the embed.

Best,
Qasem Mohammed
QFINHUB
